intro: A weary traveler sits at the roadside, turning a crumpled map this way and that.
title: The Lost Wanderer
description: The wanderer has no idea which way to go. Point them the right way and they will gladly share what they have - their marked-up map and a spare scrap of an old treasure chart.

1.label: Point the way
1.tooltip:
(+) Reveal the onward routes onto your World Map
(+) Gain a Treasure-Map Fragment
1.selected: You set the traveler straight, and they press their notes into your hands in thanks...

2.label: Leave them be
2.selected: You leave the wanderer to puzzle over the map alone.

helped: The wanderer's map charts the routes ahead, and you pocket a Treasure-Map Fragment. (Press J to view.)
